field_values.action_summary: The group says their goodbyes at the gates of the Emerald City. The Guardian returns the green spectacles to the group and formally acknowledges the Scarecrow's new role as a ruler.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of the city gates; Medium two-shots for spectacle hand-off; Close-ups on the_scarecrow reaction
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: green spectacles must be seen being returned and worn
group physical proximity to the white china wall/gate
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH019_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the transition of power for the_scarecrow through a formal ceremonial hand-off at the emerald_city_outskirts. The scene must visually resolve the Emerald City arc by transitioning from the rigid formality of the guardian's gate to the liberated movement of the departing group.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto
- guardian_of_the_gate
- green_whiskered_soldier

## Required Environments
- emerald_city_outskirts (including white china wall and gates)

## Continuity Constraints
- The green spectacles must be seen being returned/worn.
- Maintain consistent group proximity to the gate throughout the farewell.

## Beat List
- BT001: Formal acknowledgment of the group and the_scarecrow's new role.
- BT002: The ceremonial return of the green spectacles.
- BT003: The group says goodbye and departs.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
